content.en:
Somewhere on the battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

Dense supreme path void demons poured into here and began to invade the large arrays built by Taisu Palace and other forces.

Bang!!!!

The battle broke out!

Great arrays were broken one after another.

And at this very moment.

Ye Tian made a move, and he attacked a sixfold supreme void demon powerhouse as soon as possible.

The strength of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was suppressed here, and it was far from being Ye Tian's opponent.

In an instant.

This sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was killed by Ye Tian with one shot.

Followed by.

Airplanes!!!!

The seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules turned into countless golden threads, piercing the body of a Famous Dao Void Demon.

Almost one after another the Supreme Dao Void Demons fell, and such a terrifying combat power almost terrified the Supreme Dao Void Demons.

And not just this battlefield.

The Supreme Dao Void Demons were divided into many battlefields to attack together, and Ye Tian's duplicate body also went to these battlefields to slaughter this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

......

Somewhere on the main battlefield.

Seven Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons teamed up to deal with Ye Tian, but none of their attacks could break Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Vajra Body, and the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules blessed his body extremely strong, and he was not afraid of the attacks of these Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian showed invincible strength, none of these Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons could withstand a single blow.

In the blink of an eye, these six Supreme Dao Void Demons and the other fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demons who assisted in the attack were all killed by his own power.

Next, no matter what level of Supreme Dao Void Demon Ye Tian was, he was crazy to slaughter, and even used a large-scale Supreme Dao Divine Power, annihilating an area with a single blow, causing the dense Supreme Dao Void Demon to fall.

Gradually, the number of Supreme Dao Void Demons became smaller and smaller, and the number of Supreme Dao Demons was too large, so it was handled by other Supreme Dao realms.

Ye Tian's goal was to kill these Supreme Dao Void Demons and not let one go.

Soon.

These Supreme Dao Void Demons collapsed and fled frantically, while Ye Tian had been chasing and killing.

If you are tired of killing and your strength is consumed severely, you will change to another copy body to kill.

In this way, Ye Tian kept chasing and killing these Supreme Dao Void Demons, and killed them to the Void Passage.

This is their base camp in the True Dao Realm, where a large number of fortresses are located, but now they are all empty fortresses that do not serve much purpose.

Rumble!!!

The Dao Void Demon returned here and activated the Great Array, trying to use the Great Array to kill Ye Tian.

Airplanes!

An unimaginably huge Supreme Dao Void Demon Phantom appeared, holding a spear in his hand, which came across the void and struck at Ye Tian with one blow.

This is the Void Demon Shadow condensed with the power of the formation, with the power of one blow infinitely close to the Sevenfold Void Demon, and the price paid is to make many Void Demons sacrifice their lives.

This blow cannot be dodged.

Ye Tian didn't dodge either, the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules was integrated into the Supreme Dao Vajra Body, and he was also blessed with a kind of Supreme Dao Divine Power.

Moreover, he also fought back.

Rumble!

The two guns collided, Ye Tian was knocked away, and the spear of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Phantom also hit his body, breaking through the Supreme Dao Vajra body.

However, Ye Tian was only slightly injured and was not in serious trouble.

And after this formation sent out this blow, it didn't have much attack power.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian's other copy bodies entered the formation, and there was another burst of indiscriminate killing.

......

In the surrounding void, the corpses of the Supreme Dao Void Demon were all over the place, and the blood of the Supreme Dao Void Demon flowed and converged together, forming rivers of blood.

And Ye Tian's figure crossed the area, killing the hidden Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Gradually, except for a few Supreme Dao Void Demons who returned to the Void Realm through the Void Passage, the other Supreme Dao Void Demons were all ambushed.

The battlefield void passage and even the Innate Origin Domain Fusion, except that the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has a way to close it, he has no way to close it.

So, Ye Tian returned directly to Taisu Battle City.

And the news that he swept to the Dao Void Demon came back to Taisu Palace.

"Ye Tian swept away the Supreme Dao Void Demons, except for a few Supreme Dao Void Demons, all the other Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed!"

When the Taisu Palace Master got the news, he showed an excited look.

In this way, those Supreme Dao Realms of Taisu Palace would not encounter danger on the battlefield, and they would be able to deal with Wuji Heavenly Palace with all their might.

"Ye Tian's strength is absolutely invincible in the Sixth Rank Dao Realm, but it's a pity that he can't come out, otherwise assisting us in dealing with the Wuji Heavenly Palace can definitely greatly increase our combat power!" muttered the Taisu Palace Lord.

......

Taisu Battle City.

A Ming Tai Suwei came to Ye Tian's command and handed over a large number of space items.

"Lord Ye Tianjun, these are the spatial items on the Supreme Dao Void Demon that you killed, and none of the resources in them have been moved!" said a Fourfold Realm Tai Su Wei.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, collected all these resources, and then gave them a little: "These rewards are for you!"

"Thank you Ye Tianjun!"

They were excited.

After these Tai Suwei left, Ye Tian began to sort out these resources.

"Poor!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

However, taken together, the resources obtained this time were unimaginable, and many of them were useful to the Sixfold Dao Realm.

"Hey, this is a seven-pattern supreme dao weapon spear, it was actually found from a threefold supreme dao void demon!"

Ye Tian refined this supreme dao weapon spear, which could increase his strength by a bit.

Such a weapon spear, even if it is a sevenfold Dao realm, may not be available!

It is estimated that the Supreme Dao Void Demon got it by accident, but it can't be used, so it was put away.

Now, he has become his weapon.

After that, he also found a lot of good things, and many of the Supreme Dao Void Demons more or less had one or two real treasures, which together were very exaggerated.

With so many resources, he doesn't have to worry about the resources of the Triple Highest Dao Realm, and he can even go to the Quadruple Dao Realm.

Of course, it would take a long time to ascend to the peak of the Triple Dao Realm.

If you really want to improve your strength quickly, you can only do it by using the gift of the origin of heaven and earth.

"The battle situation between Taisu Palace and Wuji Heavenly Palace is quite stable, there is no need to go out for the time being, first use up the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift, and improve your cultivation!"

Ye Tianyi Nian accepted the gift of the origin of heaven and earth.

The next moment.

Endless gifts of heaven and earth origin descended and poured into Ye Tian's body.

In the following years, he has been cultivating in Taisu Battle City, refining the origin of heaven and earth, and his cultivation has skyrocketed.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already completely refined these Heaven and Earth Origins, and his cultivation had also reached the late stage of the Triple Peak Dao Realm as he wished, and he had even almost broken through to the peak of the Triple Peak Dao Realm.

In this regard, Ye Tian was more satisfied, after all, it was a gift from the origin of heaven and earth!

Coupled with the resources he obtained this time, within hundreds of Supreme Dao Eras, he could definitely raise his cultivation to the peak of the Triple Dao Realm.
